channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics

item.title: Trump expected to pick Howard Lutnick for Commerce secretary
item.description: President-elect Trump is expected to nominate Howard Lutnick to serve as Commerce secretary, a source familiar told The Hill. Lutnick is the chair and CEO of Cantor Fitzgerald and is also currently serving as co-chair of the Trump transition.
item.dc:creator: Alex Gangitano, NewsNation

item.title: Proposed Chicago police resource cuts could land city in court, top officials warn
item.description: Chicago Mayor Brandon Johnson's proposed cuts to the police department in specific areas may violate a consent decree forged between the city, state and a federal court, the Illinois attorney general warned.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Trump’s vows for revenge take on new seriousness
item.description: President-elect Trump’s vows to seek revenge have brought a renewed sense of alarm to those who have crossed ways with him now that he’s returning to the White House.
item.dc:creator: Rebecca Beitsch, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Italian Premier Meloni's coalition suffers setbacks in 2 regional elections
item.description: ROME (AP) — Italy's Premier Giorgia Meloni suffered election setbacks in two regions as the opposition Democratic party won a tight race in the central Umbria region and deepened its control of the traditional left-leaning stronghold of Emilia-Romagna.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Judge strikes down Wyoming abortion laws, including ban on pills to end pregnancy
item.description: The decision marks another victory for abortion rights advocates after voters in seven states passed measures in support of access.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, MPR News

item.title: What to know about Sean Duffy, Trump's choice to become transportation secretary
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — President-elect Donald Trump has chosen Sean Duffy to become transportation secretary in his new administration, positioning him to oversee a complex system that includes pipelines, railroads, cars, trucks, airlines and mass transit systems, as well as funding for highways.
item.dc:creator: DARLENE SUPERVILLE, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Top Democrat on House Ethics panel says Gaetz report should be released
item.description: Rep. Susan Wild (D-Pa.), the top Democrat on the House Ethics Committee, said she thinks the panel’s report on former Rep. Matt Gaetz (R-Fla.) should be released.
item.dc:creator: Emily Brooks, NewsNation

item.title: Advocates urge Biden to dismantle migrant detention before Trump takes office
item.description: Nearly 200 migrant advocacy groups have asked President Joe Biden to dismantle U.S. immigration detention facilities before President-Elect Donald Trump takes office, and to give humanitarian parole to some migrants currently detained.
item.dc:creator: Sandra Sanchez, Fox 5

item.title: Cruise line offers 4-year journey to 'skip forward' in wake of US presidential election
item.description: While the cruise line doesn't explicitly say the offer was brought on by the election, the two-year option was dubbed the "Mid-Term Selection.
item.dc:creator: Sara Filips, NewsNation

item.title: Hubbard County election judge faces felony charges for allegedly allowing unregistered voters to cast ballots
item.description: Prosecutors in Hubbard County say Timothy Michael Scouton — who was head judge at a precinct in rural Badoura Township — allowed 11 people to vote even though they had not registered.
item.dc:creator: Matt Sepic, MPR News

item.title: Rep. Josh Gottheimer joins NJ governor race
item.description: SOUTH HACKENSACK, N.J. (PIX11) - The race for New Jersey governor thickened Friday as Democratic U.S. Rep. Josh Gottheimer officially threw his hat in the ring.
item.dc:creator: Jim Vasil, PIX 11

item.title: Trump spokesperson Steven Cheung to serve as White House communications director
item.description: Steven Cheung, who has served as a top press aide on the Trump campaign for the past two years, will join the incoming administration as White House communications director, President-elect Trump announced Friday.
item.dc:creator: Brett Samuels, Fox 5

item.title: NYC broker fee bill could lead to higher rents, mayor says
item.description: NEW YORK (PIX11) – A New York City Council bill that will shift the burden of paying broker fees to landlords could have “unintended consequences” that lead to higher rents, Mayor Eric Adams said.
item.dc:creator: Finn Hoogensen, PIX 11

item.title: Cannizzaro, Yeager to continue leadership roles in Nevada Senate, Assembly
item.description: Democratic Nevada State Senator Nicole Cannizzaro will serve for a fourth consecutive legislative session as Senate Majority Leader. Democrat Assembly Speaker Steve Yeager was also reelected.
item.dc:creator: Caroline Bleakley, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Handful of votes separate Las Vegas-area council candidates, echoing their primary
item.description: Just a handful of votes separated two candidates for a North Las Vegas City Council seat as of Tuesday -- a repeat from their June primary, according to the latest totals from Clark County.
item.dc:creator: David Charns, KLAS, CBS News
